violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee trained in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The faucet in the ware washing area was observed to be leaking and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

The ceiling in the food preparation and dishwashing areas ceiling tiles are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment is to replace ceiling tiles with ceiling tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The 2-door sliding cooler was observed held at an ambient 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the unit were evaluated and some food items were moved to other refrigeration and other items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Establishment is not to store TCS foods within the unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below is maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The 2-door sliding unit was observed at an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit and the condenser coils were observed icing up and was not in good repair. Establishment is to have service repair the unit or if equipment can no longer be repaired effectively then unit shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris; -Bagel display shelving -Cameras above food preparation area -Shelving under front counter -2-door sliding unit door tracks Non-food contact surfaces of equipment and facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The ceiling in the food preparation and dishwashing areas ceiling tiles are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment is to replace ceiling tiles with ceiling tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2024
